name: Suspicious Browser Extension Installation
description: Detects installation of browser extensions from non-standard sources
query:
// Detect browser extension installations via command line
// Trigger on chrome/edge force-install or sideload patterns
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(--load-extension|--install-extension|ExtensionInstallForcelist)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
